name: Vurrock
description: This creature is a Vurrock, a creature that can absorb electricity through their horns and are omnivores. They mainly eat succulents but are no strangers to eating meat. They are cautious and weary of strangers, but not overly aggressive if you are careful enough. Maybe you can befriend this one? This image was generated with ai. I was messing around with text to image ai generation and thought this creature looked pretty cool. The vurrock is what I came up with for this creature.
creator: Narleth
